description: Koutarou's pet zombie dog. Supposedly a toy poodle, although according to various people his size always seems to change. name: Skadi
description: __Place of Birth:__ Aegir Skadi is a bounty hunter, currently employed by Rhodes Island. She has shown impressive combat prowess in the past, defeating large creatures, eliminating difficult targets, fighting crucial battles, and winning entire wars. She is very experienced in combat, but her history prior to becoming a bounty hunter is unclear. She is now an Operator for a Rhodes Island assault team, and also executes solo missions.
